description: Schema for a Margam Physics Commons domain specification. This file is generated from DOMAIN_TEMPLATE.md by Claude Code or by hand.

domain.name: string — short identifier, no spaces (e.g. 'icu_hypotension', 'turbine_fatigue')
domain.description: string — one sentence describing the physical system
domain.ground_truth_signal: string — what 'the physics was right' means (e.g. 'MAP stayed above 65 mmHg for 15 minutes')
domain.ground_truth_threshold: number — the numeric threshold for the ground truth signal
domain.ground_truth_direction: string — 'above' or 'below' (is the good state above or below the threshold?)
domain.prediction_horizon_minutes: number — how far ahead the deviation score should predict (default: 15)

dataset.name: string — dataset name
dataset.n_cases: number — approximate number of cases or episodes
dataset.time_resolution_minutes: number — how often measurements are recorded

input_channels.name: string — channel name in your domain
input_channels.ode_channel: string — which of the 25 ODE channels this maps to (see channel_map below)
input_channels.notes: string — optional context about this channel

channel_map.description: The 25 ODE input channels. Map your domain's signals to these.

interventions.name: string — intervention name (e.g. 'vasopressor_bolus')
interventions.direction_note: number — +1 if this raises the ground truth signal, -1 if it lowers it
interventions.ode_channel: string — which ODE channel encodes this intervention

confounders.name: string — confounder name
confounders.description: string — why this is a confounder (correlated with outcome but not causal)
confounders.notes: string — what the model might get wrong if it learns this as causal

eval.baseline_auroc: number — the baseline model's AUROC on this domain (if known)
eval.stratify_by: string — column to stratify holdout split on (e.g. 'case_id', 'patient_id')
